{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Treaty of Immortals
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Treaty of Immortals]] is a law that prohibits [[World Spirits]] from attempting assassinations.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39">''The Pilot'', chapter 39</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
